title: ctenitis kinabaluensis var. kinabaluensis
intro: Ctenitis kinabaluensis var. kinabaluensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, specifically found in the mountainous regions of Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis kinabaluensis var. kinabaluensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various ailments, such as fever and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea or infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
